clues.clue: This 1998 finale jailed its quartet of self-absorbed New Yorkers from a 'show about nothing.'

This chemistry-teacher-turned-kingpin dies in his lab in the finale 'Felina.'

This American was the first person to set foot on the Moon.

Launched in 1977, this probe became the first human craft to reach interstellar space.

final.clue: In 'The Dark Knight,' this anarchic, scarred villain repeatedly taunts victims with 'Why so serious?'
